meaning: n.被溺爱的人,宠爱的动物,爱子
examples: Stop fondling my limes and do something!
How can you say I am harsh, you naughty fondling?
The story-fondling thing had been going so well.
Sergeant-Major McKinney is accused of grabbing, fondling and intimidating female subordinates with demands for sex.
As repeated readings broke the spine of the book, and tiny-finger fondling mangled the pages, we bought a replacement.
